memoryArtifacts.headline: Ramiro II de Monzón (1070-1116)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Ramiro II, († 1116) sire de Monzón.

Fils de Sanche de Uncastillo (fils naturel de García IV de Navarre) et de Constance de Maranon.

Ramiro II, sire de Monzon épousa en 1087 Christine de Bivar, fille …

memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  Count of Moncon, Lord of Urroz, 1104-1108; Lord of Moncon, 1108-1116.  Disinherited Infante of Navarre; Crusader; went on the 1st Crusade with Raymond of Toulouse.

** from http://fmg.ac/Project …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón於1070年出生在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡蒙頌時，他的父親Sancho Garcés31歲，母親Constanza Sánchez de Marañón39歲。他於大約1098年與Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar在西班牙迪奧希斯 德 瓦倫西亞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1116年2月1日在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在西班牙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón于1070年出生在西班牙阿拉格昂斯卡蒙頌时，他的父亲Sancho Garcés31岁，母亲Constanza Sánchez de Marañón39岁。他于大约1098年与Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar在西班牙迪奧希斯 德 瓦倫西亞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1116年2月1日在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: Sánchez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Francisco, Miguel, Jorge, Pedro, Ramon, Raul, Roberto.
Spanish (Sánchez): patronymic from the personal name Sancho . In the US, this surname is also found among Native Americans (mainly Pueblos). Compare De Sanchez .

variants.name: Saez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Diego, Jorge, Juan, Carlos, Enrique, Miguel, Pedro, Rafael, Guillermo, Jaime.

variants.name: Sancho
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Elena, Carlos, Fernando, Jacinto, Mario, Agustin, Ana, Dulce, Emilio, Enrique, Eugenio.

Spanish and Portuguese: from Sancho, a popular medieval personal name, which is probably from Latin Sanc(t)ius, a derivative of sanctus ‘holy’. The personal name was borne by a 9th-century Christian martyr of Cordova.

variants.name: Saenz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Raul, Carlos, Luis, Jesus, Mario, Francisco, Pedro, Ricardo, Alfredo.

variants.name: Sanz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Ricardo, Juan, Luis, Enrique, Jaime, Armando, Ernesto, Francisco, Manuel, Miguel.
German: from a short form, Sando, of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with sand ‘true’.
German: habitational name from a place called Sanz in Mecklenburg-West Pomerania.

nameMeanings.name: Ramiro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón was born in 1070, in Monzón, Huesca, Aragón, Spain, his father, Sancho Garcés, was 31 and his mother, Constanza Sánchez de Marañón, was 39. He married Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar about 1098, in Diócesis de Valencia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 February 1116, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón est né en 1070, à Monzón, Huesca, Aragón, Espagne, son père, Sancho Garcés, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Constanza Sánchez de Marañón, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar environ 1098, à Diócesis de Valencia, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 février 1116, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón 1070 in Monzón, Huesca, Aragón, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sancho Garcés 31 und seine Mutter Constanza Sánchez de Marañón 39. Er hat um 1098 in Diócesis de Valencia, Spanien Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Februar 1116 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón è nato il nel 1070 nel Monzón, Huesca, Aragón, Spagna, il suo padre, Sancho Garcés, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Constanza Sánchez de Marañón, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar circa 1098, nel Diócesis de Valencia, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 febbraio 1116, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzónが1070年にスペインアラグoンハエスカモンズoンで生まれた時，父Sancho Garcésは31歳，母Constanza Sánchez de Marañónは39歳であった。約1098年にスペインディoセシス ド ベレンシアでCristina Rodríguez de Vivarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1116年2月1日に故郷で46歳で死去し，スペインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón(이)가 1070년 스페인 아라그o 후스카 몬즈o에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sancho Garcés(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Constanza Sánchez de Marañón(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1098년 스페인 디o스시스 데 발샤에서 Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1116년 2월 1일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón nasceu em 1070, em Monzón, Huesca, Aragón, Espanha, seu pai, Sancho Garcés, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Constanza Sánchez de Marañón, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar aproximadamente 1098, em Diócesis de Valencia, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1116, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón родился в 1070 г. в местности монзoн, хуеска, арагoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Sancho Garcés было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Constanza Sánchez de Marañón, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar около 1098 г. в местности диoсесис де веиленся, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 февраля 1116 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ramiro Sánchez 1st Lord of Monzón nació en 1070, en Monzón, Huesca, Aragón, España, su papá, Sancho Garcés, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Constanza Sánchez de Marañón, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Cristina Rodríguez de Vivar aproximadamente 1098, en Diócesis de Valencia, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de febrero de 1116, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en España.
